action.reasoning: Observation: In iteration 10, safe_follow_steps dropped significantly. Analysis: I had added a condition `if dist < 1.2: ang_vel = 1.5` which caused the robot to spin wildly when the human got close, breaking the facing condition and losing sight of the human. I will remove this spin condition and use a clean P-controller with target_dist=1.5. I will also change the unstuck recovery to move forward instead of backward, as backing up into a wall was likely causing it to stay stuck. I will write explore6.py to print the exact termination conditions for nav_to_pos_success to confirm if it causes early termination. Decision: Update predict.py and test_follower.py with the fixed P-controller and recovery logic. Run explore6.py and test_follower.py, and submit eval.
